PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?college ?collegeLabel ?inception WHERE {
  ?college rdfs:label ?collegeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?collegeLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?college wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q494230 .
  ?college wdt:P131 / wdt:P131 * wd:Q1186 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?college wdt:P571 ?inception
  }
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?collegeLabel) , "medical"))
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?collegeLabel) , "college"))
  .
  FILTER(! CONTAINS(LCASE(?collegeLabel) , "government"))
  .
  FILTER(! CONTAINS(LCASE(?collegeLabel) , "govt"))
  .
  FILTER(! CONTAINS(LCASE(?collegeLabel) , "public"))
  .
}
ORDER BY ?inception
LIMIT 1
